title: Squig (Jawa)

"''It's a Jawa and he says your blasters need repairing. Squig says he can fix them for 300 credits each.|[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Taggert]] and [[Elias Halbert]]|}} '''Squig''' was a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] who worked as a [[Technician/Legends|technician]] for [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Elias Halbert]]. ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|2|Out of the Cradle|reprint=1}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Black Sands of Socorro]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Squig (jawa) }} [[Category:Jawas]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Mechanics]]
